h1.visual_description: All-caps, serif font, centered at the top of the page as a running head.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically would be bold serif, larger than body text.

visual_matchers.pattern: FIGURE [NUMBER] followed by bold/regular serif caption text, often with a 'PUBLISHED BY' line in small caps.
Small numerical superscript in body text corresponding to a numbered list at the bottom of a column, separated by a horizontal rule.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Chicago-style footnotes (Author, Title, Page) located at the base of the text column.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Chapter/Section Title; Top right: Page Number. Both are in small-caps/all-caps serif.
